# NumbahWan — Full Technical Reference for AI Agents
# Last updated: 2026-02-09
# This is the deep-dive companion to /llms.txt
# For the summary version, see /llms.txt

## Repository Structure

```
NumbahWan-tcg/
├── src/
│   ├── index.tsx              # Hono app entry — all routes mounted here
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── index.ts           # Route barrel export (27 route modules)
│   │   ├── pages.ts           # Static page serving, llms.txt, robots.txt
│   │   ├── oracle.ts          # Oracle wisdom API (1220 lines — needs split)
│   │   ├── health.ts          # /api/health
│   │   ├── data.ts            # /api/data endpoints
│   │   ├── sentinel.ts        # /api/system/sentinel
│   │   ├── wallet.ts          # /api/wallet/*
│   │   ├── auction.ts         # /api/auction/*
│   │   ├── avatar.ts          # /api/avatar/*
│   │   ├── cards.ts           # /api/cards/*
│   │   ├── admin-cards.ts     # /api/admin/*
│   │   ├── card-engine.ts     # /api/card-engine/*
│   │   ├── card-bridge.ts     # /api/card-bridge/*
│   │   ├── market-trading.ts  # /api/market/*
│   │   ├── market-prices.ts   # /api/market pricing
│   │   ├── gamification.ts    # /api/game/*
│   │   ├── purchase.ts        # /api/purchase/*
│   │   ├── events-merch.ts    # /api/events-merch
│   │   ├── confessional.ts    # /api/confessional
│   │   ├── shrine.ts          # /api/shrine/*
│   │   ├── physical.ts        # /api/physical/*
│   │   ├── guide.ts           # /api/guide/*
│   │   ├── translate.ts       # /api/translate
│   │   ├── gm.ts              # /api/gm/* (Game Master)
│   │   └── cipher.ts          # /api/cipher/*
│   ├── services/
│   │   └── pvp-matchmaking.ts # PvP matchmaking engine
│   └── data/
│       └── roster.json        # Guild member roster
├── public/
│   ├── *.html                 # 90 HTML page files
│   ├── llms.txt               # AI visitor guide (summary)
│   ├── llms-full.txt          # This file (deep technical reference)
│   ├── static/
│   │   ├── nw-nav.js          # Navigation system
│   │   ├── nw-i18n-core.js    # i18n engine (12KB)
│   │   ├── nw-core.css        # Core stylesheet (49KB)
│   │   ├── nw-wallet.js       # Wallet system
│   │   ├── nw-sounds.js       # Sound effects
│   │   ├── nw-config.js       # Configuration
│   │   ├── fonts/
│   │   │   ├── NumbahWan-Regular.woff2  # Custom pixel font (2KB)
│   │   │   ├── inter-variable.woff2     # Inter variable (24KB)
│   │   │   └── orbitron-variable.woff2  # Orbitron variable (12KB)
│   │   ├── data/
│   │   │   ├── cards-v2.json           # Card definitions
│   │   │   ├── cards-s2.json through cards-s10.json  # Season data
│   │   │   ├── game-mechanics.json     # Game rules
│   │   │   ├── tabletop-stats.json     # Tabletop card stats
│   │   │   ├── avatar-components.json  # Avatar builder components
│   │   │   ├── lore-index.json         # Lore navigation
│   │   │   ├── navigation.json         # Site navigation structure
│   │   │   ├── seasons.json            # Season definitions
│   │   │   └── sentinel-report.json    # Latest health report
│   │   └── images/              # 125+ card images, 17 avatars
│   ├── museum/                  # 10 exhibit pages
│   ├── vault/                   # 3 vault floor pages
│   ├── research/                # 6 research paper pages
│   └── lore/                    # Lore story pages
├── scripts/
│   ├── nw-deepdive-guardian.cjs  # Sentinel health scanner (1682 lines)
│   ├── audit-i18n.cjs            # i18n coverage auditor
│   └── 27 other build/utility scripts
├── sentinel.cjs                  # Symlink/copy of health scanner
├── nw-memory.cjs                 # AI session memory system (964 lines)
├── memory.json                   # Memory data store (99 snapshots)
├── CLAUDE.md                     # AI assistant session protocol
├── README.md                     # GitHub-facing README
├── package.json                  # 29 npm scripts
└── wrangler.jsonc                # Cloudflare Workers config
```

## API Reference

### Oracle Endpoints

#### POST /api/oracle/ask
Ask the Oracle a life question. Returns wisdom synthesized from 4 sacred traditions.

Request:
```json
{
  "question": "I'm stressed about money",
  "language": "en",
  "history": []
}
```

Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "**Your bank account at 2am is not your life's report card.**\n\n**The Ancient Consensus:**\n- **Buddhism** (Middle Way): Neither extreme wealth nor poverty...\n- **Taoism** (Contentment): Knowing you have enough IS enough...\n- **Bible** (Proverbs 21:5): Steady plodding brings prosperity...\n- **Quran** (65:2-3): Whoever fears Allah, He will provide...\n\n**The Funny Truth:**\nDave Ramsey voice: 'Have you tried not being poor?'\n\n**Your One Step:**\nOpen your bank app. Look at last month's spending. Not to judge — to see.\n\n**Oracle's Seal:**\nYour net worth is not your self-worth. One is a spreadsheet problem, the other was solved at birth.",
  "source": "curated",
  "topic": "money"
}
```

Supported languages: en, zh (繁體中文), th (ไทย)
Topics covered: heartbreak, anxiety, failure, money, anger, fear, loneliness, grief, self-worth, stuck, forgiveness, comparison, burnout, change, purpose

#### GET /api/oracle/random?lang=en
Returns a random wisdom entry.

Response: Same format as /ask

### Health Endpoints

#### GET /api/health
Returns server status.

#### GET /api/system/sentinel
Returns the latest code health report as JSON.

### Member Data

#### GET /api/members
Returns the full guild roster with CP values and sorted rankings.

## Standalone Tools — Usage Guide

### sentinel.cjs

```bash
# Basic health check (any JS/TS project)
node sentinel.cjs

# Output:
# Composite Score:  72/100 (B-)
# Trend:            =0 (stable)  | Build #50
# Module Breakdown (10 modules):
#     71 B-  architecture   (15%)  10 issues
#     54 D   assets         (15%)  22 issues
#    100 A+  deadCode       (10%)
#     92 A   security       (15%)  1 issues
#     60 C   performance    (10%)  4 issues
# ...
# Auto-Fix Engine: 9 fixes available (5 automated, 4 manual)

# With auto-fix
node sentinel.cjs --auto-fix

# JSON output
node sentinel.cjs --json
```

10 modules scored:
- architecture (file sizes, complexity, nesting depth)
- assets (image optimization, unused assets)
- i18n (translation coverage, missing keys)
- deadCode (unused exports, unreachable code)
- security (eval usage, exposed secrets, CSP headers)
- performance (bundle size, lazy loading, render blocking)
- apiSurface (endpoint documentation, error handling)
- dependencies (outdated packages, vulnerability audit)
- accessibility (alt tags, ARIA labels, color contrast)
- seoMeta (title, description, OG tags, structured data)

### nw-memory.cjs

```bash
# What does the AI need to know right now?
node nw-memory.cjs --query

# Output:
# Total snapshots: 99 (First: 2026-02-05, Latest: 2026-02-09)
# Current Build: Bundle 536KB, Pages 116, JS Modules 62
# Hotspot Files: public/battle.html (37 changes), src/index.tsx (34)...
# Recent Fix Chains: oracle font loading → self-hosted fix → resolved
# Known Constraints: iOS audio, Cloudflare limits, i18n innerHTML...

# Pre-mortem for a specific area
node nw-memory.cjs --premortem battle
# → Shows what broke last time in battle-related files

# Record a breakage
node nw-memory.cjs --broke "i18n" "innerHTML replaced DOM, lost event handlers"

# Record a decision
node nw-memory.cjs --decide "Used inline translations instead of JSON files"

# Show file coupling (files that always change together)
node nw-memory.cjs --coupled
```

Data stored in memory.json (plain JSON, human-readable, git-tracked).

### nw-i18n-core.js — i18n Pattern

The i18n approach is intentionally simple and may be useful as a pattern:

1. Each HTML page has inline `<script>` with translations:
```javascript
const NW_I18N = {
  en: { title: "The Oracle", subtitle: "Ancient Wisdom" },
  zh: { title: "神諭", subtitle: "古老的智慧" },
  th: { title: "ออราเคิล", subtitle: "ปัญญาโบราณ" }
};
```

2. nw-i18n-core.js reads `localStorage.getItem('nw_lang')`, applies translations via `data-i18n` attributes, and fires `lang-change` events.

3. Language switch: user clicks lang button → localStorage updated → `applyTranslations(lang)` called → DOM updated → `lang-change` event dispatched.

No build step. No JSON files to maintain. No framework. Works with any HTML page.

## Architecture Notes

### Why Vanilla JS?
- 116 pages at ~57KB average HTML — total site is smaller than most React bundles
- Each page is self-contained; no shared state to manage
- Cloudflare Workers serve static HTML with 0ms cold start
- i18n is per-page, so translation files don't bloat

### Why Hono?
- Lightweight (14KB) Express-like framework designed for edge runtimes
- Native Cloudflare Workers support
- File-based routing would add complexity for 27 route modules
- TypeScript throughout

### Security Headers (applied globally)
- X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
- X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN
- Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000
- Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
- Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self' with specific allowlists

### Build Pipeline
1. `npm run build` → Vite bundles src/ into dist/_worker.js (549KB)
2. Public assets copied to dist/
3. `wrangler pages dev dist/` for local development
4. `wrangler pages deploy dist/` for production

## Data Formats

### Card Data (cards-v2.json)
```json
{
  "id": "card-001",
  "name": "RegginA",
  "rarity": "legendary",
  "season": 1,
  "class": "Warrior",
  "attack": 85,
  "defense": 72,
  "image": "/static/images/cards/card-001.webp"
}
```

### Memory Snapshot (memory.json)
```json
{
  "snapshots": [
    {
      "timestamp": "2026-02-09T04:43:31Z",
      "commit": "f24dcb0",
      "message": "feat(oracle): Premium multilingual Oracle page",
      "filesChanged": 6,
      "bundleSize": 536000,
      "pageCount": 116,
      "jsModules": 62
    }
  ],
  "breakages": [...],
  "decisions": [...],
  "constraints": [...]
}
```

## Contributing

The repo is public at https://github.com/9tvf4k6srt-sys/NumbahWan-tcg
MIT License. Use sentinel.cjs and nw-memory.cjs in your own projects.

For AI assistants: Read CLAUDE.md for session protocol. Run `node nw-memory.cjs --query` before making changes.

format: llms-full
version: 1.0
pages: 116
api-routes: 30
